backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing user profiles, basketball team sign-up logic with a 3-slot total capacity limit, position-based capacity enforcement, and role-based access control via a MixinAuthorization mixin.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that runs on canister upgrade, resetting positionConfig to 3 slots per position while preserving existing sign-up data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features — opening the sign-up form and enforcing a 3-slot capacity — to their relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the Blue Panthers NCAA sign-up app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with the page title 'Blue Panthers – NCAA Sign-Up' and a meta description for the basketball team registration app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with four routes: `/` (SignUpPage), `/signups` (SignUpsPage), `/owner` (OwnerDashboard), and `/admin` (AdminPage).
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero banner component displaying the Blue Panthers branding, a championship announcement banner, and a 'Season Started' locked status bar.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Page layout wrapper with a sticky navy header containing navigation links (including Sign-Ups for all users and Admin for authenticated admins), a main content area, and a branded footer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for submitting sign-ups, fetching all sign-ups, checking remaining team slots, and verifying if the caller is an admin, all using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Barlow fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a navy/gold dark theme including light and dark mode variants.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays all sign-ups in a table with position summary cards, experience/position badges, and login/logout controls, restricted to authenticated admins.
frontend/src/pages/OwnerDashboard.tsx: Owner dashboard page that shows a table of all player sign-ups with position and experience labels/badges, along with login/logout and refresh controls.
frontend/src/pages/SignUpPage.tsx: Player-facing sign-up form page that collects name, email, phone, age, position, and experience level, enforces the 3-slot capacity limit, and shows success/error/full states.
frontend/src/pages/SignUpsPage.tsx: Admin-only page that displays all submitted sign-ups in a styled table with position and experience badges, requiring Internet Identity login to view.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (including hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom navy and gold color palettes, display/body font families, dark mode, and plugin setup for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Blue Panthers Sign-Up app, its two implemented features (open sign-up form, 3-slot capacity enforcement), and one pending feature request.
